project.name: jam (parent)
project.description: Fast quantized CPU matmul: the JAM interface and its backends. jam-core is the interface plus dtype geometry (pure Java, no native); graalvm-annotations is the compile-only @AlwaysInline stub (provided scope, shared with jinfer); jam-native is the libjam (C) implementation behind NativeJAM (JNI/FFM); jam-scalar is the pure-Java reference (the dot floor, every dtype); jam-vector is the Java Vector API backend (register-tiled SIMD gemm per dtype). Plugin and dependency versions come from qxotic-parent; only the Java release differs.
